title: Press Release: Governor Signs SB123 to Unite Alaska’s Railbelt Utilities
summary: Press Release: Governor Signs SB123 to Unite Alaska’s Railbelt Utilities Historic Legislation Unites Railbelt Utilities to Bring Increased Efficiency, Coordination and Diverse Voices to Alaska’s Energy Future On April 29, 2020 Alaska’s Governor signed into law Senate Bill 123 to ensure the creation of a new electric reliability organization (ERO) for the Railbelt region. The legislation will bring a greater level...

title: Thank You for Our Incredible May One Match!
summary: We are blown away by your generosity. TODAY on our first ever May One Match you came to our website and called us to donate. We are incredibly grateful for your devotion to KUAC’s public broadcasting mission. Thanks to you, we will continue to educate, inform, inspire, entertain and motivate listene...
